description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a spacious open-plan layout and multiple rooms, including a large central living area, several bedrooms, and bathrooms. The house features extensive floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, allowing for abundant natural light and views of the outdoors. There is a prominent outdoor patio or garden area with greenery and a pool, seamlessly integrated with the indoor living spaces. The roof is flat, typical of contemporary architectural styles, and the exterior is finished in light, neutral tones. The interior appears to be divided by partial walls, with open sightlines and minimalistic decor. The main entrance is clearly defined, leading directly into the central living space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan layout featuring a central living area, outdoor patio, and pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance, central hallway, and a clear view of the open-plan living area, with the outdoor patio and pool visible to the left.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the long side of the house, showcasing the extensive row of large windows and the outdoor garden/patio area.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear perspective, emphasizing the pool, patio, and the back rooms of the house, with the open-plan living area in the center.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite long side, focusing on the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single modern door, minimal steps, and no porch, featuring clean lines and a direct path to the central living area.
